hooks.command: & { $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($j.tool_input.file_path -like '*beat-maker-mobile*') { Write-Output 'Tests may need updating - open beat-maker-tests.html in your browser to re-run the mobile validation suite.' } }
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if mobile tests need re-run...
